form.formComment: Missed the frame when sixth (18.20) at this track at last run and returns here after a three months break. Expected to be tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame when sixth (18.20) at this track at last run and returns here after a three months break. Expected to be tough to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together approaching the first turn, and heels checked shortly after.

form.formComment: Last start was on debut when she finished last on March 28 over 300m at this track behind Boom Smacking beaten 11 lengths (18.53) in a Maiden. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start was on debut when she finished last on March 28 over 300m at this track behind Boom Smacking beaten 11 lengths (18.53) in a Maiden. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in, bumped then shortly after heels galloped on in the back straight.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in his races. Last start finished sixth over 340m at Gunnedah, beaten 23 lengths. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in his races. Last start finished sixth over 340m at Gunnedah, beaten 23 lengths. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Fell past the winning post and failed to make the catching pen.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in her races. The latest effort was a 13 length seventh over 300m at this track. Hard to entertain this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in her races. The latest effort was a 13 length seventh over 300m at this track. Hard to entertain this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was awkwardly placed on heels for a short distance rounding the first turn.
Shifted wide on the first turn.

form.formComment: Yet to break through in six runs, the latest effort a third over 300m at this track in 17.87. Has been in the placings at his last two starts. Others rate better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Yet to break through in six runs, the latest effort a third over 300m at this track in 17.87. Has been in the placings at his last two starts. Others rate better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was hampered and carried wider rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: First starter by Aston Rupee from Go Wild Bella. Trained by Mark Knowles. Might pay to watch for a market push.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: First two runs have been average, the latest a sixth over 300m at this track. Will need to improve to feature.
